scripts.dev: bun run embed:fetch:host && ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:gpu: bun run embed:fetch:host && ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 ARROXY_GPU_MODE=force electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:swiftshader: bun run embed:fetch:host && ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 ARROXY_GPU_MODE=swiftshader ARROXY_BACKDROP_SOFTWARE=1 electron-vite dev
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && electron-vite build && bun run check:preload-bundle
scripts.dist: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:win:nsis: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:win:portable: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --win portable --publish never
scripts.dist:win:dir: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --win dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:dir: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --mac dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64:dir: bash scripts/build/fetch-embedded.sh darwin x64 && bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --mac dir --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:dir: bash scripts/build/fetch-embedded.sh darwin arm64 && bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --mac dir --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: bun run clean && bun run build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_COMPRESSION_LEVEL=5 electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:dir: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --linux dir --publish never
scripts.dist:release: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.dist:release:win: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.dist:release:mac: bun run clean && bun run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.dist:release:linux: bun run clean && bun run build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_COMPRESSION_LEVEL=5 electron-builder --linux --publish always
scripts.check: concurrently -c auto --kill-others-on-fail -n format,lint,parity,types,knip,madge,loc,pins,i18n,test "bun run format:check" "bun run lint" "bun run lint:parity" "bun run typecheck" "bun run knip" "bun run madge" "bun run check:loc" "bun run check:pins" "bun run check:app" "bun run test"
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && xvfb-run -a playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:fixtures:ci: bun run embed:fetch:host && bun run build && xvfb-run -a playwright test tests/e2e/fixture-*.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.check:i18n: bun run check:readme && bun run check:app
